Intermediate bridge: Olidebron messages.description: Under Olidebron (30m) — now shows honest ETA to target Klaffbron (not 'strax'). Previously etaMinutes was nulled for under-bridge vessels, which the old ETA-clause formatter rendered as 'strax' — a false promise since the vessel is still >500m from the target.

Multi: 2 vessels same bridge (one waitin.description: One under-bridge at target, one waiting 3 min away. The under-bridge vessel now has a computed ETA (~0.3 min) so it becomes the group lead, rendering 'strax' — accurately signalling that the bridge is opening NOW for vessel 1. Previously the under-bridge vessel was ignored (null ETA) and the wait-3-min vessel dominated.
